steps.title: Treat the repeated expression as one value
Answer the requested expression
steps.content: Since $u$ was defined as $4-9x$, the value of $4-9x$ is -7.

steps.title: Check in the original equation
steps.content: If $4-9x=-7$, then $9-4(-7)=37$ and $2-5(-7)=37$. Both sides match, so $-7$ is correct.
